name: standards-conformance report records per-standard adoption percentage from the coverage matrix
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"owasp-asvs":{"sections_total":100,"sections_adopted":65}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/coverage-matrix.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --coverage .claude-tdd-pro/coverage-matrix.json --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'adoption_pct: 65' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
